introSection: Diablo - Tren de la Mina is an Arrow Dynamics hybrid roller coaster located at PortAventura Park in Salou, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain. The ride features three chain lift hills and various tunnels. The ride's structure was designed by Ride Centerline.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Brown track and unpainted, wooden supports.

fullText:
Diablo - Tren de la Mina is an Arrow Dynamics hybrid roller coaster located at PortAventura Park in Salou, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain. The ride features three chain lift hills and various tunnels. The ride's structure was designed by Ride Centerline.



Brown track and unpainted, wooden supports.
